Artisan Coffee
Discover
Our Story

Rooted in Warmth.
Crafted with Soul.

✦

Rooted in the warmth of Madurai, Velvet Cup Café was created as a space where tradition meets quiet indulgence. We believe coffee is more than a daily habit — it's a pause, a conversation, a moment to slow down in a fast-moving world.

Our beans are carefully sourced from the lush estates of Karnataka, where rich soil and climate bring out deep, balanced flavors. Every cup we serve is crafted with care, blending local essence with refined experience — simple, soulful, and made to be remembered.

Karnataka Beans

Sourced from lush estates where rich soil and climate create deep, balanced flavors.

Slow Roasted

Small-batch roasting ensures peak freshness and full flavor in every single cup.

Expert Craft

Our baristas are trained to deliver a refined, consistent experience every visit.

Curated Space

Designed for warmth, conversation, and unhurried moments of pure comfort.

Curated Selection

Signature Collections

Every item crafted with intention. No filler, no compromise — only the exceptional.

Cold Coffee (Classic with Ice Cream)

₹120

Chilled coffee blended smooth and topped with a scoop of creamy vanilla ice cream. Rich, refreshing, and indulgent.

Bestseller

Cappuccino

₹110

Double-shot espresso layered with perfectly steamed milk and a thick cap of velvety foam. Bold, classic, and comforting.

Hazelnut Hot Chocolate

₹150

Rich dark chocolate melted into warm milk with a swirl of hazelnut. Deeply comforting and beautifully sweet.

Chocolate Milkshake

₹140

Thick, creamy chocolate milkshake blended with premium cocoa and chilled milk. A classic done perfectly.

Iced Latte

₹130

Smooth espresso poured over ice and fresh cold milk. Clean, crisp, and endlessly refreshing on any day.

New

Velvet Latte

₹160

Our signature house latte — espresso with a silky blend of steamed milk and a whisper of caramel warmth.

Signature

Black Forest Pastry

₹90

Soft chocolate sponge layered with whipped cream and cherries. A timeless classic baked fresh every day.

Bestseller

Chocolate Truffle Cake

₹110

Dense, indulgent chocolate cake coated in smooth ganache. Rich, dark, and utterly satisfying.

Red Velvet Pastry

₹120

Our signature red velvet slice with luscious cream cheese frosting — velvety, moist, and made in-house daily.

Signature

Tiramisu

₹180

Classic Italian dessert with espresso-soaked ladyfingers, mascarpone cream, and a dusting of cocoa. Elegant and rich.

New

Butterscotch Pastry

₹90

Soft vanilla sponge drenched in butterscotch sauce and topped with crunchy caramel bits. Sweet and deeply satisfying.

Croissant (Butter / Chocolate)

₹140

Freshly baked golden croissant — choose classic buttery layers or a rich chocolate-filled indulgence. Perfectly flaky.

House-baked

Oreo Milkshake

₹160

Creamy milkshake blended with crushed Oreo cookies and chilled milk. Thick, indulgent, and utterly irresistible.

Bestseller

KitKat Shake

₹170

Smooth, chilled milkshake made with KitKat pieces and rich chocolate milk. A fun, crunchy treat in every sip.

Nutella Waffle

₹180

Crisp golden waffle generously spread with Nutella and topped with fresh fruit and a dusting of icing sugar.

New

Brownie with Ice Cream

₹150

Warm, fudgy brownie served with a scoop of vanilla ice cream. The perfect hot-and-cold combination.

Caramel Cold Coffee

₹150

Chilled coffee blended with smooth caramel syrup and cold milk. Sweet, bold, and refreshingly smooth.

Signature

Lotus Biscoff Cheesecake

₹200

Creamy cheesecake on a crunchy Biscoff crust, topped with caramelized Lotus spread. Decadent and unforgettable.
